trending_videos.title: SPIDER-MAN: BRAND NEW DAY – New Trailer (4K)
trending_videos.description:
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn't forgotten them. 

Watch the new trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, in theatres July 31. Tickets on sale NOW.

July 31, 2026

It's a BRAND NEW DAY for Peter Parker. Fighting crime full-time as Spider-Man in a world that doesn’t remember him—and the pressure of seeing his old friends move on without him—sparks a change in Peter he may not have the power to control. But that transformation might also be the only thing that can stop a shocking new threat to the city and those he loves - a powerful villain no one can even see.
The world may have forgotten Peter Parker, but he hasn’t forgotten them.

Directed by:   
Destin Daniel Cretton   
 
Written by: 
Chris McKenna & Erik Sommers and Justin Kuritzkes
   
Based on the MARVEL Comic Book by: 
Stan Lee and Steve Ditko

Produced by:      
Kevin Feige, p.g.a.
Amy Pascal, p.g.a.   
Avi Arad
Rachel O'Connor, p.g.a.

Executive Producers:    
Louis D'Esposito 
David Cain

Cast:  
Tom Holland

gaming.insight: Gaming content remains highly popular on YouTube, with notable entries from VALORANT and MrBeast Gaming.
gaming.actionable_insight: Creators should focus on producing engaging gaming content, particularly around trending games like VALORANT, to capture audience interest.

trailers_and_teasers.insight: There is a strong interest in trailers and teasers, as evidenced by multiple entries related to upcoming media such as Chainsaw Man and Spider-Man.
trailers_and_teasers.actionable_insight: Studios and content creators should capitalize on the hype of upcoming releases by creating engaging teaser content.

music.insight: Music content, particularly lyric videos, continues to draw significant viewership.
music.actionable_insight: Musicians and labels should invest in high-quality lyric videos and collaborations with popular artists to maximize reach.

live_streaming.insight: Live streaming is gaining traction, with content like 'LIARS BAR' indicating engagement with live, interactive formats.
live_streaming.actionable_insight: Creators should explore live streaming opportunities to engage with audiences in real-time, leveraging interactive elements to boost viewer retention.

pop_culture_analysis.insight: Analysis and breakdown videos, such as those discussing Marvel content, are popular.
pop_culture_analysis.actionable_insight: Creators can target pop culture enthusiasts by producing detailed analysis videos on trending series and movies.

high_engagement_creators.insight: Channels like Emergency Awesome and SMii7Y appear to have high engagement, likely due to their focus on trending topics.
high_engagement_creators.actionable_insight: New creators should monitor and align with trending topics while maintaining authenticity to build engagement.

diversified_content.insight: Successful channels often diversify content types, offering trailers, music, live streams, and analyses.
diversified_content.actionable_insight: Creators should expand their content offerings to include a mix of video types to attract diverse audience segments.

international_content.insight: Content like Japanese trailers (e.g., Chainsaw Man) suggest a strong market for international and anime-related content.
international_content.actionable_insight: Creators and brands should explore international collaborations and translations to tap into global audiences.

niche_interests.insight: Unique content such as 'Meccha Chameleon spots' suggests opportunities in niche, specialized content areas.
niche_interests.actionable_insight: Creators should identify and exploit niche interests within broader categories to differentiate their content.

cross-platform promotion.insight: Channels appear to benefit from cross-promotion across other social media platforms.
cross-platform promotion.actionable_insight: Leverage other social media platforms like Instagram, TikTok, and Twitter to promote YouTube content and drive traffic.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
